rows.label: qev016101_MSG0001
rows.name:
Hey! The materials we brought from
Earth are already running out...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016101_MSG0002
rows.name:
NLA can't survive on this
excavation yield of Miranium![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016101_MSG0003
rows.name:
Yes... I know you guys are trying your
desperately! But... at this rate![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016101_MSG0004
rows.name:
...Oh, rookie... You came
again just like I said.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016101_MSG0005
rows.name:
I'm sorry... I showed you
something unsightly, didn't I?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016101_JNK0010
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev016101_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask what happened.

rows.label: qev016101_JNK0020
rows.name: Sneer

rows.label: qev016101_SEL0021
rows.name: Admonish her to stay calm precisely because it's a difficult time.

rows.label: qev016101_MSG0006
rows.name:
You're right. This isn't someone else's
problem for you either. I should probably
lecture you on this while I have the chance.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016101_MSG0007
rows.name:
In the few months since we crash-landed
on Mira, the resources we loaded onto the
White Whale are already running out.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016101_MSG0008
rows.name:
Right now, NLA is rebuilding using the
resources we obtain from Frontier Net.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016101_MSG0009
rows.name:
Therefore, we need a lot of
Miranium as quickly as possible
to stabilize the people's lives...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016101_MSG0010
rows.name:
But the installation of Data
Probes isn't progressing well...
I was just wondering what to do.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016101_MSG0011
rows.name:
...Say, rookie. Could you do it?
Everyone has their hands full and a
lot of work is just floating around.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016101_MSG0012
rows.name:
Preaching to an older woman, you've gotten
pretty high and mighty, haven't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016101_MSG0013
rows.name:
Very well, maybe I'll leave all these
missions to a big shot like you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016101_MSG0014
rows.name: Obtaining 750gm of Miranium and[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016101_MSG0015
rows.name:
Defeating the Junior Simius that
are obstructing Pathfinder missions
in Primordial Wilderness.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016101_MSG0016
rows.name:
After that—and this is a special mission—I
want you to recover highly classified data
from Data Unit FN093 that fell on Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016101_MSG0017
rows.name:
If my calculations aren't
wrong, it should be somewhere
in Primordial Wilderness too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016101_MSG0018
rows.name:
What do you say? I'll throw in a hefty
reward, so won't you challenge it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016101_MSG0019
rows.name:
Thank you. In order to get Miranium,
you need to install Data Probes, so...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016101_MSG0020
rows.name:
It would be more efficient to handle
the other missions while expanding
Frontier Net in Primordial Wilderness.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016101_MSG0021
rows.name:
Keep that in mind, rookie. That's the
Pathfinder way of advancing missions.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016101_JNK0030
rows.name: Affirmative

rows.label: qev016101_SEL0031
rows.name: Honestly accept Kirsty's advice.

rows.label: qev016101_JNK0040
rows.name: Negative

rows.label: qev016101_SEL0041
rows.name: Frown and ask her to stop treating you like a rookie.

rows.label: qev016101_MSG0022
rows.name:
It's good to be honest. That's
one of your good points.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016101_MSG0023
rows.name:
But, once you accomplish this big job, I
won't treat you like a rookie anymore.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016101_MSG0024
rows.name:
I'll acknowledge you as a
full-fledged BLADE. Do your best![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016101_MSG0025
rows.name:
Oh, you think you're already
full-fledged? Well then...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016101_MSG0026
rows.name:
Once you accomplish this big job, I
won't treat you like a rookie anymore.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016101_MSG0027
rows.name:
I'll acknowledge you as a full-fledged
BLADE. So, do your best![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016101_MSG0028
rows.name:
Save the people of NLA with
Frontier Net and your own power![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016101_MSG0029
rows.name:
I know gathering 750gm of
Miranium will be tough.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016101_MSG0030
rows.name:
But if you make full use of
Frontier Net, you should
definitely be able to get it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016101_MSG0031
rows.name:
Let's work hard together to return
NLA to the way it should be![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016101_MSG0032
rows.name:
How's the Miranium collection
progressing? With 750gm, we should
be able to scrape by for a while...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016101_MSG0033
rows.name:
Thank you! I'll immediately distribute
it to each corporation and department.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016101_MSG0034
rows.name:
I'm counting on you to handle the
rest of the missions in Primordial
Wilderness at that pace.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016101_MSG0035
rows.name: This is enough Miranium.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016101_MSG0036
rows.name:
I'm counting on you to handle the
rest of the missions in Primordial
Wilderness at that pace.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016101_MSG0037
rows.name:
Phew... Thanks to everyone's hard work,
Frontier Net is gradually expanding.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016101_MSG0038
rows.name:
...So, how are things on your end? What
happened to the jobs I asked of you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016101_JNK0050
rows.name: Pride

rows.label: qev016101_SEL0051
rows.name: Boastfully announce that you've completed the requests.

rows.label: qev016101_JNK0060
rows.name: Calm

rows.label: qev016101_SEL0061
rows.name: Matter-of-factly state that you've completed the requests.

rows.label: qev016101_MSG0039
rows.name:
We have enough Miranium, and you've
executed the missions perfectly...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016101_MSG0040
rows.name:
Hehe, you can puff your chest
out with pride! You've
accomplished a splendid job.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016101_MSG0041
rows.name:
We have enough Miranium, and you've
executed the missions perfectly...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016101_MSG0042
rows.name:
You say it like it's entirely
natural, but these aren't jobs
a rookie could do easily.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016101_MSG0043
rows.name:
You really saved us. With this,
NLA's stalled reconstruction should
start moving forward again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016101_MSG0044
rows.name:
Yeah[ST:wide ]— From today on, I'll treat
you as a full-fledged BLADE.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016101_MSG0045
rows.name:
I look forward to working with
you anew, [ST:playername ]. This is your reward.
Let's work together again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016101_JNK0070
rows.name: Hand over

rows.label: qev016101_SEL0071
rows.name: Hand over 750gm of Miranium.

rows.label: qev016101_JNK0080
rows.name: Do not hand over

rows.label: qev016101_SEL0081
rows.name: Do not hand it over for now.

rows.label: qev016101_MSG0046
rows.name:
Even while we do this, NLA's Miranium
is being consumed rapidly... We
don't have much time, so hurry.[ST:wait ]
